The Republican Governors Association has millions to dish out. [](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTUxODA0OAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMTE5NTEyNAS2&mt=1&rt=0)

Republican Bill Bryant is running to be a champion for his ultra-rich friends, not for working Washingtonians. That's why the Koch brothers are funding the RGA with millions of dollars. That's why Bryant's friends funneled big money his way for a massive ad blitz. With so much big money coming in, the RGA is eyeing Washington as a state where the time is ripe to ramp up and tear us down. Bill Bryant will be the big beneficiary. name: Newt Gingrich
subject: The real battle
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Team Ryan, a joint fundraising committee authorized
body: Peter, Especially at stake this year: the White House, the Senate, and the House. So if we're going to win, we need to learn from the lessons of 2012. Conservatives felt great going into Election Day 2012. We had the momentum and the polls were shifting in our direction. But because of Obama's vaunted ground game, he came out on top. This year we aren't going to let that happen again. name: Ben Carson
subject: These are real results:
body:
Peter,

Over the past couple of weeks, I've been telling you about My
Faith Votes' media plan to motivate Christians to get to the
polls in 2016. I've asked for contributions, and now I want you
to see some of the results thus far.

The goal is to raise $200,000 in order to reach over 150 million
households with radio and TV Public Service Announcements, and
I'm happy to report we are about halfway there.

Due to the ongoing generosity of thousands of people like you, My
Faith Votes has begun developing more Public Service
Announcements, and they're now airing on 6 different Christian TV
networks. They are now reaching millions of people per week -- a
direct result of your support.

Continuing at this pace, My Faith Votes will hit their ultimate
goal - the millions of Christians who did not vote in 2012 will
vote in 2016!

Will you help us continue our push with a tax-deductible donation
of any amount now?
http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37584795:WC3JjvbNe:m:3:876315805:47A2F2AE7898654E12127EEF1B084F38:r

The 2016 elections always seemed like a long way off, but they're
honestly right around the corner. It's crunch time, and this is
our opportunity to really make a difference.

In the last few weeks, the polls have started to really take a
turn. This is proof that elections are fluid. Things can change
rapidly, and My Faith Votes need to be prepared.

Families around the country are beginning to tune in much more
closely, and there are millions of conversations happening around
dinner tables as people of faith choose what they're going to do
in November. These are the people we must reach, and with your
help I'm confident we will.

At My Faith Votes, we are making progress every day. With your
tax-deductible gift of any amount today, that will continue
through November 8th.
http://email.bencarson.com/ct/37584795:WC3JjvbNe:m:3:876315805:47A2F2AE7898654E12127EEF1B084F38:r

Thank you for your ongoing generosity. It is appreciated more
than you know.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

Friend,
In 11 days, I get the honor of fighting for you in the first presidential debate against Crooked Hillary Clinton.

To prepare for the BIGGEST night of our campaign, I'm turning to the very people who have humbled me and gotten me to where I am today... YOU.

As your champion, I need to know what you want me to fight for on that stage. I want you to be confident that I defend the issues you care about. I want to make you proud, Friend.

**[Which is why I'm asking you to take the TRUMP Debate Preparation Survey now. >>](http://rnctrack.hosted.strongview.com/t/ecebaL0bQBSMbBDzOoaFNSkDRMN6aaaaK0EtBL2VKQna?q=5@x~3~zA&a=hl0ephmo-3_kieep.Ysi&p=b&1=&n=455152CZiXepi6tnilCerdCfjYCpCpCdj6i&pCp) **

I asked my campaign manager, Kellyanne, to commission this survey to our strongest supporters -- the people who will be the reason we WIN this debate against Hillary Clinton.

Friend, this debate isn't even about me. I'm only going on stage to be your voice. This debate is a fight between the American people and the political machine that Crooked Hillary represents.

We get the chance to compare -- side-by-side -- our vision of a freer, safer, and more prosperous America with Hillary's promise to bring four more years of Obama's failures.

I want your honest input. If you disagree with something, tell me you disagree. Look, I never made it in business surrounding myself with people who tell me what I want to hear. Our campaign is about telling it like it is -- and that's not changing. Not now. Not ever.

With the debate coming up FAST, I'll need your input IMMEDIATELY.

Donald J. Trump

By now you know my policy about cherry-picking public polls. But I have to call your attention to some breaking numbers out of Ohio yesterday from _Bloomberg News_ :

**Four-way race:**
Clinton: 39
Trump: 44
**Trump +5**

**Two-way race:**
Clinton: 43
Trump: 48
**Trump +5**

This five-point lead -- officially outside of the margin of error -- is Trump’s biggest of the entire general election cycle.

And you know what I always say about looking at one poll in isolation? The RealClearPolitics _average of polls_ for Ohio now has us basically tied.

We're talking about Ohio here -- a state that's pivotal every four years. The state that gave us four more years of President Bush in 2004. The state that paved the way for President Obama’s wins in 2008 and 2012.

This team’s got a crucial goal to meet by the end of the month: 2.5 million grassroots donors. It’s not an elegant number. It’s not a random benchmark. This goal is what we need right this minute to supercharge our ground game in Ohio and a bunch of other states. It’s how we win.

name: Bob =?UTF-8?Q?Fertik=2C=20Democrats=2Ecom?=
subject: The climate emergency
body:
|
---
[](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/6GWsl/6/6v/r5cs/6FoFo5/zoAItrfjHF) [**Add your name to the #VoteClimate pledge: "I will vote only for climate champions who support a 100% clean energy future."**](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/6GWsl/s/6z/r5cs/6FoFo5/6KdXUCWldV) Activist - Hey there. It's after Labor Day, which means it's time to get serious about elections. With the scale of the global climate emergency, it's not enough to keep Donald Trump out of office. We need to put politicians -- all of them -- on notice that the climate crisis is the biggest crisis facing the next few generations of humanity, not just another Democratic issue, and if they don't vote accordingly they'll be voted out of office. Not just in 2016, but in 2020 and thereafter. And mid-term state legislative contests in 2018. And every off-year parks and recreation board election. How will we do this? The first step is very simple: become one of the first Americans to take the #VoteClimate pledge: [**" I will vote only for climate champions who support a 100% clean energy future."**](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/6GWsl/v/6z/r5cs/6FoFo5/siKtIwIOQ2) The pledge builds on the ferocity of the new Democratic Party platform, which rejects the "all of the above" rhetoric from 2012. Climate activists pushed for, and got, a platform promise to prioritize wind and solar over fossil fuel-based energy. The platform calls for our nation running entirely on clean energy by mid-century - but we won't get there unless we elect uncompromising climate champions. Together, we can amplify each other's voice, so that the media and the politicians notice the rise of the climate activist voter bloc. The #VoteClimate effort isn't just a pledge -- it's a grassroots-powered campaign. What might be the most important part of the pledge is **signing up to volunteer** -- from helping to share the word all the way to building custom ballot guides that show which candidates are climate hawks, and which are climate deniers. [**Tell the world it 's time to take the climate crisis seriously: Pledge to #VoteClimate.**](http://democrats.ontraport.com/c/s/EFw/6GWsl/z/6z/r5cs/6FoFo5/zWx9afc1iB) Yours, Brad Johnson
Executive Director
Climate Hawks Vote

If you wish to stop receiving our emails or change your subscription options, please [Manage Your Subscription](http://democrats.ontraport.com/u/OTg0MjAvMC8xOTM2Njk2LzAvNTYvMC82ZDJiNTMxZjI0MjMwNWVmMGVhN2M0MTI4NmQzMzcxZS8xOTM1MDg0Nw==)
Democrats.com, Box 1452, New York, NY 10276

Friend,

The politicians and liberal elites have not been listening to you.

But I hear you loud and clear. That's why I am the people's candidate for president with a rising movement of pro-America voters ready to take back our country.

Your name was forwarded to me as a loyal citizen who is fed up with the lies, corruption, and incompetence of Hillary Clinton and all the other Washington liberals.

You have my word I will take action on YOUR concerns and speak up for YOUR interests.

That's what I've been doing this whole time.

When I said _we should not be letting tens of thousands of Syrian refugees into our country if we don 't know who they are_, the liberal elites screamed out against me, _but they were not listening to you._

When I said _we should build a real border wall_ because if you don't have a border, you don't have a country, they raged against me on TV, _but they were not listening to you._

subject: Comittment to our miners
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Justice for Governor
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1154066535211988992/-5574470575884728320?refcode=home)
Earlier this week, Jim Justice announced he is asking state leaders across West Virginia to join him in signing a commitment to West Virginia coal and coal miners. The goal is simple: Jim wants to build united coalition to grow coal jobs and protect miners.

Our campaign sent more than 250 letters to Democrats, Republicans, and Independents asking them to join Jim's Coal Commitment. See text of letter below.

The Coal Commitment can be signed online at [JusticeForWV.com/CoalCommitment](https://act.myngp.com/el/-1154066535211988992/-5502412981846800384).

Please ask your local candidates to sign on to Jim's Coal Commitment.

The letter below was sent to every legislative and statewide candidate. Forward this email to the candidates and elected officials in your area, and urge them to sign the commitment.

FULL TEXT OF COAL COMMITMENT LETTER

September 13, 2016

Dear Friend:

I am writing to ask that you join me in committing to fight for the future of West Virginia's coal industry and the safety of our coal miners. 802-595-3776
**Phil Scott Releases Economic Development Plan**
_More than 50 specific proposals give Vermonters an in-depth look at how the Scott Administration will drive economic growth and address Vermont’s crisis of affordability_
Colchester, Vt. –Phil Scott, candidate for Governor, released a comprehensive economic development plan at a press conference today, reinforcing his commitment to making the economy and affordability his top priorities.

Joined at the event by 20 legislators and Vermont business leaders, Scott presented his economic plan, which contains more than fifty (50) specific proposals, initiatives, and ideas to strengthen the economy and make Vermont more affordable.

This comprehensive blueprint for Scott’s economic initiatives represents the most comprehensive plan presented by a candidate for Governor, giving voters a clear view of how Scott’s Administration will lead.

Debbie Winters, who owns Firetech Sprinkler in Colchester and hosted Thursday’s event, offered context for why economic development is the biggest issue for her in this election:

“I am so honored that Phil Scott came to Firetech to talk about his plan for what I think are the most important issue facing Vermonters and Vermont businesses today – affordability and economic strength,” said Winters. “Like all employers, we face many challenges, and our challenges are not unique. For many of Vermont’s contracting firms - and frankly companies across the spectrum - we face the challenge of a shrinking workforce. Phil’s innovative approach to public education will include more hands-on apprenticeships and a focus on technical and trades education.” Winters added. “Phil is a man of his word. I know that he will do everything in his power to make Vermont more affordable and more prosperous for Vermont’s small businesses and for our employees.”

“I am running for Governor to make the economy and affordability the top priorities in Montpelier,” Scott said. “For the last six years, tax and fee increases, healthcare mandates, and one-party rule have caused the cost of living to increase by more than $4,500 for an average household per year, not including property tax increases. The cost of living in Vermont is outpacing growth in many Vermonters’ incomes. My plan offers a new approach that will confront Vermont’s affordability crisis and restore our state’s focus on the economic and fiscal fundamentals that support job retention and creation. Together, we can strengthen the economy, expand the middle class through real growth and lift take-home wages. But we must be focused and work together,” Scott added.

Key pillars of Scott's plan include:
* Protecting jobs and retaining current employers;
* Expanding our workforce and workforce training opportunities;
* Revitalizing our county economic centers, expanding innovation hubs and designating high-tech zones;
* Putting healthcare reform back on track;
* Increasing the availability of good homes working families can afford;
* Advancing pro-growth, pro-jobs tax policy;
* Modernizing state government; and
* Setting parameters to ensure state spending does not grow faster than the economy or your wages.

Scott added that he’s open to additional ideas too.
“This plan represents my starting point for making Vermont more affordable and jumpstarting economic growth,” he said. “I know, however, that no one person, or political party, has a monopoly on good ideas. I’m always looking for input and ideas on how to make Vermont stronger and more affordable. I look forward to working across the aisle, as I have my entire political career, to advance these initiatives when I am Governor, and I am prepared to fight for pro-growth policies that strengthen our economy,” Scott concluded.
###

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 2
body:
Hillary's team is facing a deadline | Derek --

Most of the time, I try not to worry about the daily push and pull of political pundits, but after the past few weeks, it's worth saying something about the way this election has been covered.

There’s been too much false equivalency and too clear of a double standard at play. So I want to take a minute to compare these two candidates, side by side.

While Hillary was fighting school segregation in the South, Donald Trump was sued for discriminating against people of color.

While Hillary has released every single tax return from the past few decades, Trump has provided next to nothing about his financial situation.

While Hillary was fighting for first responders after tragedy struck on September 11th, 2001, Trump was bragging that his building was now the tallest in all of Manhattan.

And while Hillary’s foundation has saved countless lives around the globe, Donald Trump has used money people have given his so-called charity to buy a six-foot-tall painting -- of himself.

Derek, this is a man who utters things on a daily basis that would disqualify any other candidate. But because he says something outrageous or nonsensical every time he steps up to a podium, he gets a pass.

**[And the only way that will change is if we do something about it](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=11&ms=MjY1MjEwMTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgyMzg1NTA4S0&mt=1&rt=0)** \-- which means rolling up our sleeves and working as hard as possible to elect Hillary come November.

**Hillary’s team needs to tally 2.5 million donors by the end of the month to have enough in its pocket to fight Donald Trump’s callousness and bigotry at every turn from now through Election Day. Will you join us and make your first donation today? Her team will send you a free sticker as a thank you if you chip in now to guarantee that, on November 8th, our country will choose hope over fear once more:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=6&ms=MjY1MjEwMTYS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODgyMzg1NTA4S0&mt=1&rt=0)
Let’s get busy. Let’s get to work.

Thank you, Derek,

Barack

|

body:
We know big money could turn this race upside down. | Dear Friend, I know how quickly things can change in elections. That's why I'm urgently requesting your help to build our Rapid Response Fund. **Our goal is $15,000 by mid night tomorrow. Can you help?** | [**CONTRIBUTE »**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=3&ms=OTUyNTUwOAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMTI4NTAzMgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
---
Between the deep pockets of my opponent's ultra-rich friends and the commitment of the Republican Governors Association to come after me, we know big money could turn this race upside down.
The GOP operatives behind his campaign are looking at the calendar and calculating when to launch their barrage of attack ads. Their hope is catching us flat-footed, unprepared to fight back -- and out of time to respond.
[**That 's why I'm asking you personally for a contribution today.**](http://links.e.jayinslee.com/ctt?kn=2&ms=OTUyNTUwOAS2&r=MTM2NjM5NDY2ODI1S0&b=0&j=MTAwMTI4NTAzMgS2&mt=1&rt=0)
These Republican attacks are not something we can worry about later. There won't be time. Our Rapid Response Fund gives us the resources right now to prepare.
Thank you for standing with me.
Very truly yours,
Jay Inslee

I wanted to update you on our grassroots fundraising goal – we’re almost there! Since Monday, we’ve raised $5,278 towards this goal, and we need just a little more in the account before tomorrow afternoon.

[**Can you chip in $20 to help us cross this finish line?**](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage2.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=f9c9be9dd6&e=32f1a3df98) I know Bill will be so glad to hear the good news.

\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Justin Matheson
Date: Wed, Sep 14, 2016 at 8:56 AM
Subject: path to victory
To: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Friend

I just wrapped up a meeting with Bill about our goals for the final two months of this campaign. We were discussing our path to victory, and the resources we need to win this election.

Right now, we’re ramping up our grassroots campaign across Washington. Our poll data shows that when voters learn about Bill and his background, his support soars. That’s why we have volunteers knocking on doors, making phone calls, and communicating with voters about the Bryant alternative to the failed Inslee Administration.

These efforts require resources, and I’m asking you to support our plan by contributing what you can today. I told Bill we need to raise another $10,000 by the end of the week, and I know we can do it, but only with your help.

[Would you be willing to put $10, $25, $50, or more towards supporting our grassroots campaign? ](http://billbryantforgovernor.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a508ffc703e6fc82360a383e8&id=03b4714e67&e=32f1a3df98)

Thank you for your support! I’m looking forward to telling Bill we’ve met our goal.
